original_image_tags: High-contrast scan of a typewritten report page on dark background. Two hole-punch marks are visible on the left margin. The words "TOP SECRET" and "RESTRICTED" are stamped at the top, with "RESTRICTED" stamped again at the bottom. A handwritten number "15" is visible in the bottom right corner.

elements.description: Page consists of typed body text with 'RESTRICTED' stamped at the top and bottom. There are no embedded photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree there are no embedded visual elements (photographs, sketches, etc.) on the page, only typed text and stamped markings, so there is no visual content to disagree about.
